assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a terminal with cURL.
No Exa account, free credits, or API key exists yet.

developer_goal: Create an Exa account, obtain free credits and an API key, and complete a Search API request over HTTPS without installing an SDK.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.exa.ai/search with x-api-key returns search results JSON after onboarding free credits and an API key.
first_success.observable_signal: The Search API returns a successful JSON body containing search results for the requested query.

route_selection.surface: Get started with Exa via cURL Search
route_selection.rule: Prefer the shortest complete path that reaches an authenticated Search API response without requiring an SDK when cURL is documented.
route_selection.selected: Get started with Exa via cURL Search

candidates.name: Get started with Exa via cURL Search
candidates.reason: Exa's Get started guide states its outcome is making the first request to an Exa API endpoint. The same page documents a cURL POST to https://api.exa.ai/search with x-api-key and says cURL needs no installation. Search and crawl is the firs

candidates.name: SDK-first Search tab
candidates.reason: SDK install is optional; the quickstart says cURL needs no installation.

required_path.observable_result: The cURL Search example is visible.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to an Exa account and open the Dashboard.
required_path.observable_result: API Keys and Billing are reachable.

required_path.action: Complete new-account onboarding to receive the documented $10 in free credits.
required_path.observable_result: Billing shows a positive credit balance from free credits.

required_path.action: Get an Exa API key from the Dashboard and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The key value is available locally.

required_path.action: Export the key as EXA_API_KEY in the terminal.
required_path.observable_result: EXA_API_KEY is set for the current shell.

required_path.action: POST a Search request with cURL to https://api.exa.ai/search.
required_path.observable_result: The API returns a successful JSON body containing search results.

required_path.action: Confirm the Search JSON includes search results for the query.
required_path.observable_result: Search results are present in the successful response.

prerequisites.description: An Exa account that can open the Dashboard.
A positive credit balance. New accounts receive $10 in free credits when onboarding is completed; requests are blocked when the balance runs out.
An Exa API key from the Dashboard, exported as EXA_API_KEY.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

external_gates.description: An Exa account and Dashboard access are required before an API key can be created.
New accounts must complete onboarding to receive the documented $10 free credits; requests fail when credits are exhausted.
A secret API key must be obtained and supplied as x-api-key on the Search request.

platform_outcomes.description: POST https://api.exa.ai/search with x-api-key returns search results JSON after onboarding free credits and an API key.

excluded.reason: The quickstart documents an equivalent cURL call and says cURL needs no installation.

excluded.item: Payment method for first free-credit request
excluded.reason: New accounts receive $10 free credits after onboarding.

sources.title: Get started with Exa
evidence_supported: cURL POST to https://api.exa.ai/search with x-api-key

sources.title: Exa Dashboard
evidence_supported: Dashboard entry for account and keys

sources.title: Error codes
evidence_supported: Requests fail with 402 when credits are exhausted

sources.title: Billing
evidence_supported: Requests blocked when credit balance runs out
Add credits via Stripe when needed

uncertainties.question: Exact interactive fields and steps inside Dashboard onboarding that gate the $10 free credits.
uncertainties.impact: Could add undocumented form or wait steps before free credits appear.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Billing docs state free credits after onboarding but do not publish the interactive onboarding field contract.
